name: sherlock-impact
description: Shows downstream cross-application impact for the working-tree changes — same engine as the Sherlock MR bot, surfaced before you even commit.

commands.title: Sherlock: Analyze Impact of Pending Changes

sherlock.endpoint.description: Base URL of the Sherlock service (no trailing slash).

sherlock.baseRef.description: Git ref to diff against. Sherlock's analyze-diff endpoint will clone this ref and overlay your working-tree changes.

sherlock.appName.description: Override the application name. Defaults to the basename of the workspace folder if blank.

sherlock.token.description: Optional auth token (sent as Authorization: Bearer ...). Leave blank for local dev.

sherlock.analyzeOnSave.description: Auto-run impact analysis 1 second after each save (debounced). Off by default — large workspaces should keep it manual.
